title: Pyar Ki Takkar
subTitle: Pyar Ki Takkar

title: Hello Hum Lallan Bol Rahe Hain
subTitle: Lallan, a security guard, loves Saroja, who is supposed to get married to an older man for money. However, while convincing her to change her mind, he finds out another shocking fact about her.

title: Tapish
subTitle: After her husband dies on the night of their wedding, Lajwanti is forced to live out her life as a widow. But even when she starts to take an interest in someone else, her past becomes an obstacle.

title: The Stoneman Murders
subTitle: A suspended police officer embarks on a personal quest to find a cunning serial killer targeting street dwellers in Bombay.

title: Zameer - The Fire Within
subTitle: A spoiled brat marries her professor but he leaves soon after discovering she was responsible for the separation from his former girlfriend.

title: Sunday
subTitle: Sehar, an amnesiac voice-over artist, finds that she has no recollection of one day in her life. Troubles ensue for her when she realises that she might have been involved in a crime.

title: Provoked
subTitle: After years of abuse, Kiranjit incinerates her husband, Deepak, and goes to prison. There, her cellmate, Ronnie, asks her stepbrother to pursue an appeal, hoping to find real justice for Kiranjit.

title: Maine Dil Tujhko Diya
subTitle: Ajay falls in love with Ayesha, a fellow college student who is the daughter of a rich businessman. However, problems arise when Ayesha's father arranges her marriage to an associate's son.

title: Mangal Pandey - The Rising
subTitle: Mangal Pandey and William Gordon become friends during a war in Afghanistan. But when the East India Company introduces a rifle that uses objectionable cartridges, Mangal Pandey rises in revolt.

title: Bhed Ek Rahasya
subTitle: Sattu, a professional killer, is given the task to kidnap a famous industrialist. However, chaos ensues when the man's daughter gets involved with a criminal.

title: Call for Fun
subTitle: Yash takes over his father's call centre, into a romantic hotline hub, as he and his friends embark on a hilarious adventure until they face a mafia gang.

title: Love Alive
subTitle: Bhaarat reminisces a dream about a happy and fulfilling life, only to wake up lonely the next day. However, he finds love and strives to take his relationship forward.

title: Golmaal Kids
subTitle: A rich businessman fatefully bumps into his former girlfriend while on the search for someone to take care of his three mischievous children.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
subTitle: Raj and Priya, a married couple, hire Madhubala, a prostitute, as the surrogate mother of their child. Trouble brews when Madhubala falls in love with Raj and insists on keeping the child.

title: Gali Gali Chor Hai
subTitle: Bharat, a common man, decides to fight corruption and secure the rights of common people when some government officials take advantage of him.

title: Patth
subTitle: Avi, a young man, murders Bhullar, a local gangster, along with his friends after his sister, Nandini, is killed. Later, they surrender themselves to Bhullar's boss and eventually join his gang.
